channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Disney's Magical Princess-Inspired Wedding Dresses Are Brought to Life in Fantastical Fashion Show
item.description: The 2026 Disney Fairy Tale Weddings dress collection designs are inspired by Disney princesses Aurora, Jasmine, Rapunzel, Tiana and more

item.title: Is Riley Green Responding to Megan Moroney's Album Tracks with New Unreleased Song 'POS Like Me?'
item.description: On Friday, Feb. 20, Moroney released her third studio album — and it featured songs fans believe are about Green

item.title: Chris Hemsworth Reveals He Has Multiple Tattoos Inspired by His 13-Year-Old Daughter's Drawings
item.description: The 'Avengers' star is a dad of three with wife Elsa Pataky

item.title: Kanye West Faces Court Battle Over Malibu Mansion as Ex-Employee Seeks $1M in Unpaid Wages
item.description: Tony Saxon first filed suit against the rapper in September 2023, alleging disability discrimination and multiple labor code violations

item.title: Travis Kelce and Patrick Mahomes’ 1587 Steakhouse Sued on Claim of Trademark Infringement
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs stars opened the restaurant in September 2025

item.title: '90 Day Fiance' Star Jovi Dufren Booted From Nobu After Dumpling Argument
item.description: "90 Day Fiancé" star Jovi Dufren had a rough night at Nobu New Orleans ... he and his buddies got booted from the fancy restaurant after a heated argu...

item.title: Sydney Sweeney Cuts Business Ties With Ex-Fiance Jonathan Davino
item.description: Sydney Sweeney has cut a huge business tie with her ex-fiancé, Jonathan Davino, dissolving their old production company and starting a brand new one w...

item.title: Addison Rae’s Dad Agrees to Take DNA Test Over Pop Star’s Little Brother
item.description: Addison Rae’s dad Monty Lopez agreed to submit to a DNA test to determine if he is the father of the pop star’s little brother, TMZ has learned. A Lou...

item.title: Pro-America Song Streams Skyrocket After Team USA Wins Gold
item.description: Team USA's thrilling OT win against Canada for Olympic gold has fans from sea to shining sea feeling damn proud to be American ... 'cause Spotify tell...

item.title: Sexy Celebrity Legs Guess Who!
item.description: Can you guess which Hollywood hottie put her sexy stems on full display in these eye-popping pics?! Here are your clues: She's a social media creator ...
